docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,884.00 FILED BY WALKUP STEVE OWEN DEBORATH AS TO DEFENDANT HAMAMCIYAN ARTIN IND/DBA ARTCO REMODELING & CONSTR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMAMCIYAN ARTIN IND/DBA ARTCO REMODELING & CONSTR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-03-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKUP STEVE OWEN DEBORATH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMAMCIYAN ARTIN IND/DBA ARTCO REMODELING & CONSTR $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00, THIS JUDGMENT IS FOR THE WOOD SIDING REPLACEMENT ALL OTHER CLAIMS ETC DISMISSE4D WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
